name: Lemon-Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Have a 9-inch pie plate ready.
2. For the crust: In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, and salt. Add oil and milk. Stir with a fork until well blended. The mixture will be crumbly. Scatter it evenly in the ungreased pie plate. Press into the bottom and up the sides, creating a plain rim.
3. For the lemon filling: In a large bowl, mix sugar, flour, and lemon peel. Whisk in lemon juice, butter, milk, and egg yolks until blended. Beat egg whites with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form when beaters are lifted. Gently fold the whites into the lemon mixture.
4. Pour the filling into the crust.
5. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a pick inserted near the center comes out clean and the top is golden brown. Let cool completely on a wire rack. Cover and refrigerate up to 2 days.
6. Up to 8 hours before serving: Arrange sliced berries around the outer edge of the pie, leaving a 2-1/2 inch circle empty in the center. Fill this circle with the reserved whole strawberries. Brush the sliced and whole berries with melted strawberry jam. Refrigerate until serving.
